scripts.build: cargo build --bin tish-polars-run && cargo build --bin gen-tpch-data
scripts.test:cli: cd examples/polars-cli && cargo run --quiet --manifest-path ../../Cargo.toml --bin tish-polars-run -- src/main.tish
scripts.test:bench: npm run gen-data -- --scale ${BENCH_SCALE:-0.01} && cd examples/polars-bench && cargo run --release --quiet --manifest-path ../../Cargo.toml --bin tish-polars-run -- src/main.tish
scripts.test:sql-join: cd examples/polars-sql-join && cargo run --quiet --manifest-path ../../Cargo.toml --bin tish-polars-run -- src/main.tish
scripts.test: npm run build && npm run test:cli && npm run test:bench && npm run test:sql-join && npm run test:http
